message:
fix(core): route CTE INSERT...SELECT through interpreted fallback

The VDBE codegen's find_table cannot locate CTE-materialized temp
tables that exist only in the connection's live schema (RefCell),
causing "no such table" errors for INSERT...SELECT with CTEs.

Fix: in execute_insert_with_ctes, when the INSERT source is a
SELECT, read the source rows via the connection-level execute_statement
(which CAN resolve temp tables through the live schema), then insert
them row-by-row via parameterized INSERT...VALUES statements. This
bypasses the VDBE codegen entirely for CTE INSERT...SELECT.

Fixes: test_conformance_cte_insert_s142

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
